task_description: Implement Phase 6 (Production Polish) of NexusQueue: structured pino logging, Prometheus /metrics endpoint, API key + JWT auth, OpenAPI/Swagger docs, and comprehensive README update.

verification.summary: Build succeeds with 0 TS errors. All 92 tests pass (75 existing + 17 new). Tests exercise actual auth middleware, metrics endpoint, Swagger UI, and login flow.
